title: ipomoea indica var. acuminata
intro: Ipomoea indica var. acuminata, also known as Indian morning glory or moonflower, is a species of flowering vine in the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea indica var. acuminata include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and acting as an anticonvulsant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including insomnia, anxiety, and epilepsy.
